payload.summary_zh: GEOFlow 2.0.4 修复已部署环境中后台版本号被 .env 固定的问题，系统版本默认跟随本地 version.json，更新中心可正确对比本地与 GitHub 最新版本。
payload.summary_en: GEOFlow 2.0.4 fixes stale admin versions in deployed environments by reading the local version.json by default, allowing the Update Center to compare the local version with the latest GitHub version correctly.
payload.upgrade_tip_zh: 升级后建议执行 php artisan optimize 重新生成配置缓存；如果旧 .env 中仍保留 GEOFLOW_APP_VERSION，可无需再维护该项，系统版本会以本地 version.json 为准。
payload.upgrade_tip_en: After upgrading, run php artisan optimize to rebuild cached configuration. If an old .env still contains GEOFLOW_APP_VERSION, it no longer needs to be maintained because the app version now follows local version.json.
